summary: W929 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while removing W928's explicit f <= principal univ support premise from the target-codomain compactness primitive. targetCodomainCompactOuterNonbottomPrimitiveOfNoPrincipalPrimitiveW929 reconstructs W928's provider by ignoring that principal-universe premise and delegating through the W928 route. Product success remains false because all W929 route leaves are still explicit assumptions and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W929 removes the principal-universe support premise from the target-codomain compactness primitive, but the resulting filter non-bottom and meet non-bottom primitive field and the rest of the W929 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W929 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W929 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions, the primitive target-difference preimage quantifier inherited from W923, the primitive target-codomain compactness filter non-bottom condition and neighborhood-filter meet non-bottom conclusion, primitive selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 closed-set image propositions, the primitive mapped explicit cokernel closed-set image proposition, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, raw source-category pretriangulated and triangulated propositions, the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ExactAt-to-epi facts, and bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
